pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":[["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://rustup.rs/","rel":"nofollow","children":"Rustup"}]," 是 Rust 官方的跨平台 Rust 安装工具。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["镜像站只会保留一段时间的 nightly，如果在安装时出现错误，请用 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"RUSTUP_DIST_SERVER= rustup ..."}]," 来使用官方源。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"使用 rustup 安装 rust 时，若要启用镜像源，执行："}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"对 Linux/macOS 用户："}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"对 Windows，PowerShell 下："}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"powershell"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"若要长期启用镜像源，执行："}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"对 Linux/macOS 用户："}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":"对 Windows，PowerShell 下："}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3","codeLanguage":"powershell"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"注：rustup 在判断是否需要更新时依赖于 toml 的 sha256，由于 toml 内容中相关链接被替换为镜像源，第一次切换到镜像源时各个 channel 会被认为需要更新。"}]]}]
